notes: Ran "protontricks 15100 d3dcompiler_43" in terminal and launched game without PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command% for a decent performance gain ~10-20fps, but experienced a weird control bug and couldn't move mouse camera right on occasions. If you experience the same issue then try running with launch option PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command% and suffer the small performance loss while avoiding an irritating bug.
title: Assassin's Creed™: Director's Cut Edition

notes: Used launch option PROTON_USE_WINED3D for best performance overall. Runs perfectly well but minor issues are: Can't Alt+Tab and play time not logged correctly in Steam (only shows as 1 minute).
title: Assassin's Creed™: Director's Cut Edition

notes:
Without tweaks the game start but I've got a black screen just after the intro movie.
If I had PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command% to launch options in steam game properties, now I can see the game menu.
title: Assassin's Creed™: Director's Cut Edition

notes: Added PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command% as others suggested to bypass black screen.  For this game to recognize my wireless Xbox controller on Arch Linux, I had to install xboxdrv from the aur (refer to Arch's gamepad wiki), and set the /etc/default/xboxdrv to the wiki's recommended settings.  Afterwards, everything + controller worked well.
title: Assassin's Creed™: Director's Cut Edition

notes: Finished the game in DX10 mode. Only one twick needed to run game perfectly - WINEPREFIX="/home/$USER/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/15100/pfx" winetricks d3dcompiler_43. Absolutely stable and smooth and bugfree. On my system lowest FPS i saw was 75 with 200 average.
title: Assassin's Creed™: Director's Cut Edition

title: Assassin's Creed™: Director's Cut Edition

notes: Game won't start out of the box on Proton with DXVK, after the loading screen there is just a black screen. Using WineD3D doesn't work with DX11. When using PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 the game will start on WineD3D with DX9. To use the game on Vulkan I installed D9VK and the game worked even better.

title: Assassin's Creed™: Director's Cut Edition

notes:
Works perfectly with d3dcompiler_43. Install winetricks and call:

WINEPREFIX="/home/$USER/.steam/steam/steamapps/compatdata/15100/pfx" winetricks d3dcompiler_43

then play normally via Steam, enjoy
title: Assassin's Creed™: Director's Cut Edition
